name: cc-cnf-sync
description: Backup and restore Claude Code configuration, with per-project memory kept in continuous two-way sync across machines/OS via SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks (conflict-safe: divergent notes are never lost). The memory hook authenticates through the machine's own git credential helper — no personal access token to expire. Backed by a private GitHub repository, fully portable across Linux, macOS and Windows. Run /setup after installing.
